name: ASRock B550 PHANTOM GAMING 4 ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4733+(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - HDMI - Realtek GbE LAN
shortName: ASRock B550 PHANTOM GAMING 4 ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550
description: ATX motherboard with PCIe 4.0 and WiFi support for mid-range AM4 gaming builds.
